name: io.github.nirholas/x402-bridge
title: x402 Universal Payer
description: Pay any x402 endpoint on the open web: auto-paying bridge with Bazaar discovery and spend caps.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_BRIDGE_EVM_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: 0x-prefixed 32-byte hex private key that funds USDC payments on EVM chains (Base, Arbitrum, …). At least one of the EVM/SVM keys is required. Treat like cash — use a dedicated low-balance wallet.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_BRIDGE_SVM_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Solana secret key that funds USDC payments: base58 64-byte secret key (Phantom / solana-keygen format) or a JSON array of 64 integers. At least one of the EVM/SVM keys is required. Treat like cash.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_BRIDGE_MAX_PRICE_PER_CALL_ATOMIC
environmentVariables.description: Per-call spending cap in atomic units (USDC has 6 decimals). Payments above this abort with a clear reason.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_BRIDGE_MAX_TOTAL_ATOMIC
environmentVariables.description: Cumulative session spending ceiling in atomic units. Once total spend would exceed it, further payments abort until restart.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_BRIDGE_ALLOWED_PAYTO
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated payee allowlist. When set, any payment whose payTo address is not listed is refused.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_BRIDGE_ALLOWED_HOSTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated hostname allowlist for outbound paid requests. When set, any other host is refused before a request is signed.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_BRIDGE_ALLOW_HTTP
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to allow http:// targets (local development only). https is enforced otherwise.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_BRIDGE_DISCOVER_LIMIT
environmentVariables.description: Max number of x402 Bazaar resources to register as dynamic tools at startup. Set 0 to disable discovery.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_BRIDGE_BAZAAR_URL
environmentVariables.description: x402 Bazaar discovery endpoint. Override to point at a self-hosted or alternative bazaar.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_BRIDGE_BATCH_DEPOSIT_MULTIPLIER
environmentVariables.description: How many request-amounts to deposit at once when opening an EVM batch-settlement channel.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_BRIDGE_MAX_DEPOSIT_ATOMIC
environmentVariables.description: Hard cap in atomic units on a single batch-settlement channel deposit or top-up.

environmentVariables.name: X402_MCP_BRIDGE_CHANNELS_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for persisted batch-settlement channel state (survives client restarts).

environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL_8453
environmentVariables.description: Per-chain RPC override, one variable per chain id (RPC_URL_<chainId>, e.g. RPC_URL_8453 for Base). Defaults to viem's public RPC for that chain.
